results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS bounced_sessions_count
FROM analytics.web_sessions
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_coupons_count
FROM pricing.coupons
WHERE status = 'active'

SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_successful_refunds
FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE status = 'successful'
results.error: invalid input value for enum refund_status: "successful"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS deletion_count
FROM audit.audit_log
WHERE action = 'DELETE'
results.error: invalid input value for enum audit_action: "DELETE"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT AVG(score) AS average_csat_score
FROM support.csat_responses

SELECT COUNT(*) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_won = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) AS churned_subscriptions_count
FROM billing.subscriptions
WHERE status = 'canceled' AND ended_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS marketing_blasts_sent
FROM marketing.campaign_messages
WHERE sent_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS goods_out_movements_count
FROM inventory.stock_movements
WHERE kind = 'goods-out'
results.error: invalid input value for enum movement_kind: "goods-out"

results.pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT l.id) AS leads_converted_to_customers
FROM crm.leads l
WHERE l.converted_account_id IS NOT NULL OR l.converted_contact_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS failed_webhook_callbacks
FROM comms.webhook_deliveries
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT 
    status AS delivery_state, 
    COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM 
    comms.notifications
GROUP BY 
    status

SELECT 
    action, 
    COUNT(*) AS entry_count
FROM 
    audit.audit_log
GROUP BY 
    action
ORDER BY 
    entry_count DESC

SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC('month', occurred_at) AS month, 
    COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
    analytics.events
GROUP BY 
    month
ORDER BY 
    month

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS failed_count
FROM ops.job_runs
WHERE status = 'failed'
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
    COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN bounced_at IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::float, 0) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages

SELECT 
    billing.invoices.currency_code, 
    SUM(billing.invoices.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices
GROUP BY 
    billing.invoices.currency_code

SELECT 
    tenant_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.opportunities
WHERE 
    is_closed = FALSE
GROUP BY 
    tenant_id

SELECT 
    comms.notifications.id AS notification_id,
    identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
    comms.notifications
JOIN 
    identity.users ON comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT 
    opp.id AS opportunity_id,
    opp.name AS opportunity_name,
    pipe.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
    crm.opportunities AS opp
JOIN 
    crm.pipelines AS pipe ON opp.pipeline_id = pipe.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT pr.id) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.status = 'captured'

SELECT c.id, c.code
FROM pricing.coupons c
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
WHERE cr.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    p.code AS coupon_code, 
    SUM(pr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM 
    pricing.coupons p
JOIN 
    pricing.coupon_redemptions pr ON p.id = pr.coupon_id
GROUP BY 
    p.code
ORDER BY 
    p.code

SELECT 
    csat.rated_agent_id AS agent_id, 
    AVG(csat.score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses csat
GROUP BY 
    csat.rated_agent_id
HAVING 
    AVG(csat.score) < 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    marketing.campaigns c
JOIN 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm ON c.id = cm.campaign_id
GROUP BY 
    c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id,
    p.name AS pipeline_name,
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id AND o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

SELECT
    date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(CASE WHEN le.direction = 'debit' THEN le.amount ELSE 0 END) OVER (ORDER BY date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at)) AS running_total_debits
FROM
    billing.ledger_entries le
WHERE
    le.direction = 'debit'
GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', le.occurred_at)
ORDER BY
    month
results.error: column "le.direction" must appear in the GROUP BY clause or be used in an aggregate function

results.pred_sql:
SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa.display_name, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_csat_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa ON cr.rated_agent_id = sa.user_id
GROUP BY 
    sa.display_name

SELECT 
    inv_warehouses.name AS warehouse_name,
    COUNT(inv_stock_movements.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM 
    inventory.stock_movements AS inv_stock_movements
JOIN 
    inventory.stock_locations AS inv_stock_locations ON inv_stock_movements.stock_location_id = inv_stock_locations.id
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses AS inv_warehouses ON inv_stock_locations.warehouse_id = inv_warehouses.id
GROUP BY 
    inv_warehouses.name

SELECT DISTINCT comms.email_log.recipient_email
FROM comms.email_log
LEFT JOIN sales.orders ON comms.email_log.user_id = sales.orders.user_id
WHERE comms.email_log.opened_at IS NOT NULL
  AND sales.orders.id IS NULL

SELECT 
    p.code AS plan_code,
    SUM(i.total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
    billing.invoices i
JOIN 
    billing.subscriptions s ON i.subscription_id = s.id
JOIN 
    billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE 
    i.status = 'paid'
GROUP BY 
    p.code
ORDER BY 
    total_invoiced_amount DESC

SELECT
    geo.countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(sales.return_items.refund_amount) AS total_refunded_amount
FROM
    sales.returns
JOIN
    sales.orders ON sales.returns.order_id = sales.orders.id
JOIN
    geo.addresses ON sales.orders.shipping_address_id = geo.addresses.id
JOIN
    geo.countries ON geo.addresses.country_id = geo.countries.id
JOIN
    sales.return_items ON sales.returns.id = sales.return_items.return_id
GROUP BY
    geo.countries.name
ORDER BY
    total_refunded_amount DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT i_users.email
FROM identity.users AS i_users
JOIN billing.subscriptions AS b_subs ON i_users.id = b_subs.user_id
JOIN crm.contacts AS crm_contacts ON i_users.id = crm_contacts.owner_user_id
JOIN support.tickets AS s_tickets ON crm_contacts.id = s_tickets.requester_user_id
JOIN billing.plans AS b_plans ON b_subs.plan_id = b_plans.id
WHERE b_subs.status = 'active'
  AND b_plans.name = 'Enterprise'
  AND s_tickets.status IS NOT NULL
